<!-- Generated by `npm run build:context` (GRAMMAR.md §10). Do not edit by hand. -->

# Zebkit agent context

Zebkit is a token-driven, accessibility-first web component library. Components have one semantic grammar; utility classes are exhaustive, token-bound CSS vocabulary.

## Components

- [zbk-button](zbk-button.md): A light-DOM element wrapping a real <button>: renders the token-driven skeleton, reflects variants into classes, forwards native semantics, and adds the one behavior a native button lacks (loading).
- [zbk-checkbox](zbk-checkbox.md): A binary (or mixed-state) choice: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="checkbox"> inside its own label, with an aria-hidden control span visualizing its state.
- [zbk-heading](zbk-heading.md): The zbk-heading component.
- [zbk-input](zbk-input.md): Single-line text entry: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input> inside its own label, with optional format-as-you-type masking.
- [zbk-radio](zbk-radio.md): One option in a mutually exclusive group: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="radio"> inside its own label. Radios sharing a name form a native group — mutual exclusion, arrow-key navigation, and form submission come from the platform.
- [zbk-select](zbk-select.md): Pick from a fixed set of options: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <select> inside its own label. Authored option content is adopted into the select; remaining default children are the visible label.
- [zbk-textarea](zbk-textarea.md): Multi-line free-form text entry: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <textarea> inside its own label. No affixes, no masking.
- [zbk-toggle](zbk-toggle.md): An on/off switch that takes effect immediately: a light-DOM element wrapping a real <input type="checkbox" role="switch"> inside its own label — the APG switch pattern on a fully native input, drawn as a track with a traveling thumb.
- [zbk-tooltip](zbk-tooltip.md): Supplementary text beside a control: a light-DOM element that adopts its child as the trigger and renders a positioned bubble. mode="hint" (default) describes the trigger on hover/focus per WCAG 1.4.13; mode="toggle" is a click-triggered toggletip announced through the shared live region.

## Utilities

- [Layout utilities](utilities-layout.md): flex, display, positioning, object fitting, overflow, and visibility.
- [Grid utilities](utilities-grid.md): grid tracks, placement, alignment, and sizing.
- [Spacing utilities](utilities-spacing.md): margins, padding, sizes, position offsets, and page or section rhythm.
- [Typography utilities](utilities-typography.md): type scales, text behavior, and long-form prose.
- [Border utilities](utilities-borders.md): border width, radius, style, and semantic border color.
- [Effects utilities](utilities-effects.md): elevation, opacity, stacking order, transitions, and focus rings.
- [Interaction utilities](utilities-interaction.md): cursor and pointer-event behavior.
- [Color utilities](utilities-color.md): token-bound ink, canvas, border, fill, and interaction-state color surfaces.
